title: C4OS Grill Question 008b: Workflow Proof Boundary
description: This follow-up resolves a mismatch between the selected first workflow and the proof result. Submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: Which workflow should freeze as the actual first MVP slice?
options: Chat/status only: agent answers with visible thinking/status, no required file change or Browser proof
Project-change workflow: agent changes a file, runs command, shows Browser preview, and saves resumable session
Two-step freeze: chat/status is first milestone, project-change workflow is MVP acceptance
Keep both as one MVP slice even if it is broader
questions.help: Your previous answer selected chat/status, but the success proof requires project change, command output, Browser preview, and session resume.

questions.label: Minimum acceptance for the first usable MVP
questions.help: Select only what must pass before the MVP can be called usable.

questions.label: What should explicitly not block this MVP slice?
questions.help: These can remain in MVP scope or future scope, but this asks what should not block the first slice.

questions.label: Clarifications
questions.help: Clarify whether the first milestone and MVP acceptance are different things.
